caption: A man with glasses, a beard, and a headset microphone wears a white button-down shirt and a black tie while speaking in front of a screen displaying a colorful waveform. Beside him is a close-up image of a tiger's face. On-screen text progressively appears and changes; it begins as "EXPANDING THEIR REACH" and then evolves to read "EXPANDING THEIR REACH WITH THE TIGER'S DEN," with the latter part highlighted in yellow. In a subsequent scene, the text changes to "EXPANDING THEIR REACH WITH THE TIGER'S AVAILABLE." The final sequence shifts focus entirely to the tiger, positioned against a blurred natural background, as the text updates to "$1 AVAILABLE TO ALL TIGERS." The transitions show a progression of text overlays while shifting the visual emphasis from the man and the tiger side-by-side to a full shot of the animal.
